requirement_topic.en: EMC and Radio Type Approval — Power Banks with Integrated Electronics and Wireless Functions (UNBS + UCC)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC与无线电型号核准——含集成电子元件及无线功能的移动电源（UNBS + UCC）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC與無線電型號核准——含整合電子元件及無線功能的行動電源（UNBS + UCC）

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, and display) are electronic apparatus. In Uganda there is no single EU-style EMC Directive; instead UNBS applies the relevant adopted Uganda Standard (commonly aligned with CISPR / IEC EMC standards such as CISPR 32 emissions and CISPR 35 immunity) as part of the PVoC conformity assessment for in-scope products. Separately, any product incorporating wireless functionality (for example Qi wireless charging output, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, or NFC) is radio communication equipment and requires type approval / equipment authorisation from the Uganda Communications Commission (UCC) before it may be imported, sold, or used in Uganda, in addition to UNBS conformity. UCC type approval covers frequency, power, and protocol compliance for the Ugandan radio spectrum.
summary.zh: 移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出及显示屏的便携式电池组）属于电子装置。乌干达没有单一的欧盟式EMC指令；UNBS转而在受监管产品的PVoC合格评定中适用相关采用的乌干达标准（通常与CISPR/IEC的EMC标准对齐，如CISPR 32辐射及CISPR 35抗扰度）。此外，任何含无线功能的产品（如Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙电量指示或NFC）属无线电通信设备，除UNBS一致性外，在乌干达进口、销售或使用前还须取得乌干达通信委员会（UCC）的型号核准/设备授权。UCC型号核准涵盖乌干达无线电频谱的频率、功率及协议合规。
summary.zht: 行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出及顯示幕的便攜式電池組）屬於電子裝置。烏干達沒有單一的歐盟式EMC指令；UNBS轉而在受監管產品的PVoC合格評定中適用相關採用的烏干達標準（通常與CISPR/IEC的EMC標準對齊，如CISPR 32輻射及CISPR 35抗擾度）。此外，任何含無線功能的產品（如Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙電量指示或NFC）屬無線電通信設備，除UNBS一致性外，在烏干達進口、銷售或使用前還須取得烏干達通信委員會（UCC）的型號核准/設備授權。UCC型號核准涵蓋烏干達無線電頻譜的頻率、功率及協議合規。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 32 / IEC equivalent — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — emission (as adopted Uganda Standard)
CISPR 35 / IEC equivalent — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — immunity (as adopted Uganda Standard)
Uganda Communications Act, 2013 — UCC equipment type approval / authorisation for radio communication apparatus
UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) — conformity assessment of regulated electronic products

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products are governed by GB/T 9254.1-2021 (radio disturbance characteristics of information technology equipment, Class B emissions) and GB/T 17618-2015 (immunity). Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval administered by MIIT, which is specific to Chinese radio frequency allocations and protocol implementations. Chinese GB/T EMC test reports and SRRC approval are domestic instruments and are NOT recognised by UNBS conformity assessment or by UCC type approval in Uganda; separate Uganda-facing EMC evidence and UCC equipment authorisation are required.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求由GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性，B类辐射）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗扰度）管理。含无线功能的产品须取得由工业和信息化部管理的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国无线电频率划分和协议实现。中国GB/T EMC检测报告及SRRC核准属国内文书，不被乌干达UNBS合格评定或UCC型号核准认可；须另行提供面向乌干达的EMC证据并取得UCC设备授权。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求由GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技術設備無線電騷擾特性，B類輻射）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗擾度）管理。含無線功能的產品須取得由工業和信息化部管理的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國無線電頻率劃分和協議實現。中國GB/T EMC檢測報告及SRRC核准屬國內文書，不被烏干達UNBS合格評定或UCC型號核准認可；須另行提供面向烏干達的EMC證據並取得UCC設備授權。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for wireless products sold in China

gap.en: Two distinct Uganda obligations arise for power banks with integrated electronics or wireless features. (1) EMC: UNBS assesses conformity against an adopted Uganda Standard (commonly CISPR/IEC-aligned) within PVoC; Chinese GB/T 9254 / GB/T 17618 reports support engineering review but are not standalone UNBS evidence, and IEC/CISPR-aligned EMC test data is the cleaner route. (2) Radio type approval: wireless functions trigger UCC equipment authorisation — a separate process from UNBS, with its own application, fees, and per-device-model authorisation; Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer. Exporters must confirm the wireless module operates on Uganda-permitted frequencies/power limits, obtain a UCC type-approval certificate, and ensure the in-country importer presents both the UNBS Certificate of Conformity and the UCC authorisation at import. Unlike the EU there is no single CE mark covering both; the two regulators are addressed separately.
gap.zh: 含集成电子元件或无线功能的移动电源在乌干达产生两项不同义务。（1）EMC：UNBS在PVoC内依据采用的乌干达标准（通常与CISPR/IEC对齐）评估一致性；中国GB/T 9254/GB/T 17618报告可支持工程审查，但不是独立的UNBS证据，与IEC/CISPR对齐的EMC测试数据是更顺畅的路径。（2）无线电型号核准：无线功能触发UCC设备授权——独立于UNBS的流程，有自身申请、费用及按设备型号的授权；中国SRRC核准不可转移。出口商须确认无线模块在乌干达许可的频率/功率限值内运行、取得UCC型号核准证书，并确保境内进口商在进口时同时提交UNBS合格证书和UCC授权。与欧盟不同，乌干达没有同时涵盖两者的单一CE标志；两个监管机构须分别处理。
gap.zht: 含整合電子元件或無線功能的行動電源在烏干達產生兩項不同義務。（1）EMC：UNBS在PVoC內依據採用的烏干達標準（通常與CISPR/IEC對齊）評估一致性；中國GB/T 9254/GB/T 17618報告可支持工程審查，但不是獨立的UNBS證據，與IEC/CISPR對齊的EMC測試數據是更順暢的路徑。（2）無線電型號核准：無線功能觸發UCC設備授權——獨立於UNBS的流程，有自身申請、費用及按設備型號的授權；中國SRRC核准不可轉移。出口商須確認無線模塊在烏干達許可的頻率/功率限值內運行、取得UCC型號核准證書，並確保境內進口商在進口時同時提交UNBS合格證書和UCC授權。與歐盟不同，烏干達沒有同時涵蓋兩者的單一CE標誌；兩個監管機構須分別處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC conformity to the adopted Uganda Standard assessed within UNBS PVoC for regulated electronic products; UCC equipment type approval mandatory before import/sale/use for any product with wireless functions; the two are separate processes
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Power banks are electronic apparatus assessed for EMC against an adopted Uganda Standard within UNBS PVoC, and wireless-enabled variants additionally require Uganda Communications Commission (UCC) type approval before import, sale, or use. Chinese GB/T 9254 reports and SRRC approval are domestic instruments and do not transfer; IEC/CISPR-aligned EMC evidence plus a UCC authorisation are the practical requirements. There is no single Ugandan mark covering both UNBS conformity and UCC radio approval — they are handled separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 移动电源属电子装置，在UNBS PVoC内依据采用的乌干达标准进行EMC评估；含无线功能的型号在进口、销售或使用前还须取得乌干达通信委员会（UCC）型号核准。中国GB/T 9254报告及SRRC核准属国内文书，不可转移；与IEC/CISPR对齐的EMC证据加UCC授权是实际要求。乌干达没有同时涵盖UNBS一致性和UCC无线电核准的单一标志——两者分别处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 行動電源屬電子裝置，在UNBS PVoC內依據採用的烏干達標準進行EMC評估；含無線功能的型號在進口、銷售或使用前還須取得烏干達通信委員會（UCC）型號核准。中國GB/T 9254報告及SRRC核准屬國內文書，不可轉移；與IEC/CISPR對齊的EMC證據加UCC授權是實際要求。烏干達沒有同時涵蓋UNBS一致性和UCC無線電核准的單一標誌——兩者分別處理。

source.publisher: Uganda Communications Commission (UCC) — Equipment Type Approval; UNBS PVoC for EMC conformity
